site.title: Andreas Stürmer
site.intro: I build retro gaming ports, launchers, themes and asset packs with a focus on quality, usability and platform love.
site.profileAlt: Illustrated portrait of Andreas Stürmer with an orange cat

news.title: Latest News
news.headline: Currently working on...
news.emptyText: Nothing listed yet — probably busy teaching old hardware new tricks.

items.text: A few days ago I started to work on an Amiga classic as a "Refurbished" game and also another Amiga classic as Android port... Let's see what comes of it... there will be more to read soon (hopefully).
OUYAlaunch optimized - Better game detection and reduced automatic background scanning for slightly better performance. Check it out!
Unreal (1998) and Unreal Tournament '99 Android have been updated recently with Touch controls and the latest bugfixes. Check it out!
The ZGloom Editor for Windows is now a full blown campaign editor: Edit maps, edit textures, edit the whole gamescript - even make your own Gloom-based game! Release 1.1.0 available now!

featured.title: Featured Projects
featured.quote: I love bringing classic experiences to new platforms and devices.

items.title: OUYALaunch
items.description: A fast and elegant launcher for the OUYA console. Built for performance, controller-navigation and a beautiful browsing experience.

items.title: ZGLOOM Collection
items.description: Modern Amiga Gloom source ports for Windows, macOS, Android/OUYA and PS Vita, including screenshots, features and downloads.

items.title: Unreal for Android
items.description: Android versions of Unreal (1998) and Unreal Tournament '99 (armeabi-v7a/32bit) with controller-focused support.

items.title: Plugins4AmigaAMP
items.description: This repository includes a few Plugins for the well known Mediaplayer 'AmigaAMP' for Amiga OS.
items.subtitle: Plugins

items.title: Unreal Android
items.description: Android port of the classic FPS, focused on SDL2/OpenGL ES rendering, mobile compatibility and Android devices using a controller.
items.subtitle: Unreal (1998) Android port

items.title: Unreal Tournament '99
items.description: Android port of the classic Multiplayer FPS, focused on SDL2/OpenGL ES rendering, mobile compatibility and Android devices using a controller.
items.subtitle: UT99 Android port

items.title: EKA2L1-DualStick
items.description: Android-focused fork of EKA2L1 with proper dual-analog-stick support for Symbian OS and N-Gage games on modern handhelds.
items.subtitle: EKA2L1 dual-stick fork

items.title: ZGLOOM-Editor
items.description: Standalone Win32/x86 editor for creating, inspecting and editing maps for the FPS Gloom / ZGLOOM.
items.subtitle: Level editor for Gloom/ZGLOOM (FPS)

items.title: Zendure-IP
items.description: ioBroker local Zendure polling adapter with optional HEMS aggregation and a curated, compact state set.
items.subtitle: Zendure local polling

items.title: OUYAlaunch
items.description: Fast, OUYA-themed Android launcher for the OUYA micro-console with favourites, genre tabs and icon caching.
items.subtitle: Game-Launcher for OUYA microconsole

items.title: ZGLOOM-Android
items.description: Modern source port of the Amiga FPS Gloom for Android with focus on OUYA and Android TV-style boxes.
items.subtitle: Android build of Amiga Gloom

items.title: ZGLOOM-x86
items.description: Windows x86 port of ZGLOOM with improved renderer, extended in-game options and subtle post-processing effects.
items.subtitle: PC x86 build of Amiga Gloom

items.title: ZGLOOM-macOS (Universal)
items.description: A macOS build of ZGLOOM bringing the full Amiga Gloom collection to Apple Universal Macs.
items.subtitle: MacOS Silicon build of Amiga Gloom

items.title: ZGLOOM-Vita (Vita2D)
items.description: GPU-accelerated Vita2D port of Gloom, Gloom Deluxe, Gloom 3 and Zombie Massacre for PS Vita / PSTV.
items.subtitle: PS Vita build of Gloom

items.title: The official HEXFlow database
items.description: Cover images, background pictures and background music for RetroFlow-Launcher and HexFlow-Launcher for PS VITA.
items.subtitle: PS VITA Database

items.title: Sega EverDrive Themes
items.description: Some custom made themes for Krikzz' EverDrive cartridge. You need at least Firmware MEGAOS 4.07 to use custom themesets.
items.subtitle: EverDrive
